headline: Corpay Cross-Border Named the Official FX Supplier of Vålerenga Fotball AS
summary: TORONTO, June 04, 2026--Corpay, Inc.*, (NYSE: CPAY) a global leader in corporate payments, is pleased to announce that Corpay’s Cross-Border business has entered into an agreement with Vålerenga Fotball AS to become their Official Foreign Exchange (FX) Supplier.
